description: Your university rocketry team is preparing their 7-motor clustered rocket for a Range Safety review. Using the base design at /home/ga/Documents/rockets/clustered_motors.ork, perform a Failure Mode and Effects Analysis (FMEA) simulating the failure of exactly one outboard motor. The analysis requires a new motor configuration where only 6 motors ignite and a flight simulation to evaluate asymmetric thrust effects. Save the modified rocket design containing both configurations to /home/ga/Documents/rockets/clustered_fmea.ork. Write an FMEA incident report to /home/ga/Documents/exports/fmea_report.txt comparing nominal vs. failure apogee and describing the flight path consequences.
